title: Squirrel Removal in Yonkers, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Yonkers, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving all Yonkers neighborhoods. Call today for fast service!
intro: Squirrels causing damage in your Yonkers attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Yonkers and Westchester County. Our experienced technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your home from squirrel invasions.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Yonkers residents, we understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in both historic homes and modern developments throughout the city. Our licensed technicians provide fast, humane, and guaranteed squirrel removal with same-day service available for emergencies.
localContext: Yonkers' tree-lined neighborhoods from Getty Square to Crestwood provide ideal habitat for gray squirrels seeking entry into attics and chimneys. The city's mix of Victorian-era homes, pre-war apartment buildings, and waterfront properties along the Hudson River all face unique squirrel entry point vulnerabilities that our team expertly addresses.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Yonkers typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or damage repair is needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Yonkers home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Yonkers. Most squirrel trapping and removal is completed within 3-7 days, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry. Emergency services are available for urgent situations.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane and legal in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State and Westchester County regulations for humane wildlife removal. We use live traps when possible and employ exclusion techniques that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. All our methods comply with local wildlife ordinances.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Yonkers homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can chew through roof soffits, fascia boards, and insulation, creating entry points that lead to costly damage. They gnaw on electrical wiring creating fire hazards, contaminate attics with droppings and urine, and can damage HVAC ducts. Early removal prevents extensive and expensive repairs.
